jsonLd.title: Ustraa is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Ustraa! We are hiring a E-commerce Executive for our Coimbatore team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Ustraa:
Ustraa is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ustraa!
